1.  Copy/paste files 

   ```javascript

   ```

     Contoh : sudo cp /home/larona/Desktop/file.txt /home/larona/Desktop/file_copy.txt

   *  copy/paste directories 

     ```javascript

     ```
   * overwrite existing file 

     ```javascript

     ```
2.  Move/rename files 

   ```javascript

   ```

     Contoh : sudo mv /home/larona/Downloads/image.png /home/larona/Pictures/photo.png
3. Upload files to the server 

   ```javascript

   ```

     Contoh : scp -i Desktop/private_key.pem Documents/file.txt root@cloud.larona.id:/var/www/file.txt
4.  Download files from the server

   ```javascript

   ```

     Contoh : scp -i Desktop/private_key.pem root@cloud.larona.id:/var/www/file.txt Documents/file.txt

    
5.  Connect to server 

   ```javascript

   ```

     Contoh : ssh -i Desktop/private_key.pem ubuntu@cloud.larona.id
6. Archive file 

   * zip file 

     ```javascript

     ```
   * tar.gz file 

     ```javascript

     ```
   * tar.xz file 

     ```javascript

     ```

       Contoh : zip Documents/archive.zip Documents/file1.txt Documents/file2.txt

   ```javascript

   ```

     Contoh : sudo find /var/www/ -name "*.tar.xz"
